verse.name: v1
verse.lines: Burn on, burn on, Oh, fire of God burn on, Till all my dross is burned away, Prepare me for the testing day Oh, fire of God burn on.

verse.name: v2
verse.lines: Burn on, Burn on, Oh, fire of God, burn on! 'Til all my soul, Christ's image bears His holy, heavenly nature wears, Oh, fire of God, burn on!
